prestazioni: Engine swap to a **M102.985** (2.3L inline-4) with a **Garrett T3/T4 hybrid turbocharger** (60-1 trim compressor, .63 A/R turbine housing) running 12 psi of boost, paired with a **Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pump** and **Siemens DEKA 60 lb/hr injectors** for a target of 220 HP at the wheels. Custom **Schrick 264° camshafts** and **Mahle forged pistons** (9.5:1 compression) ensure reliability under forced induction.

Full **3.64:1 limited-slip differential** from a W124 300E (part #1243500301) with **ZF S5-31/5 5-speed manual transmission** (from a W124 300E 24V) for improved gear ratios and durability. **AP Racing CP5250 twin-piston calipers** with **330mm slotted rotors** (front) and **Brembo 08.5254.10 rear calipers** with 280mm rotors for stopping power.

Custom **K&N RC-2300 cold air intake** with a **Mocal oil cooler** (part #OC-100-L) and **Setrab 20-row core intercooler** (2.5" inlet/outlet) to manage intake temperatures. **MSD 6AL ignition box** with **NGK BCPR7ES spark plugs** gapped at 0.028" for optimized combustion under boost.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny W123 widebody kit** (custom-fabricated to fit the 230E sedan) with **OEM Mercedes-Benz AMG-style front splitter** (part #A1238800150) and **custom carbon fiber rear diffuser** by **Prior Design**. **BBS RS 15" wheels** (7J front, 8J rear) wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport 4S 205/50R15** tires for period-correct stance with modern grip.

**Recaro SRD Evo II seats** (W123-specific mounting brackets) upholstered in **Nappa leather with Alcantara inserts** by **Status Racing**, paired with a **MOMO Prototipo steering wheel** (350mm diameter) and **custom aluminum shift knob** (weighted, 5-speed pattern) by **Short Shifter Industries**.

**Hella Rallye 1000 headlights** (H4 conversion) with **Cibie Oscar LED fog lights** and **custom LED taillights** (W123-specific housing) by **Depo Racing**. **Full respray in Mercedes-Benz **Lime Gold (DB 197)** with **PPG clear coat** and **3M matte black vinyl wrap** on the roof and pillars for contrast.
